basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
basics.summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 5+ years shipping production systems at scale, including AI platforms serving 50,000+ users. Proven expertise designing and deploying end-to-end solutions from elegant user interfaces to robust cloud infrastructure, with deep specialization in autonomous agent systems, rapid iteration, and high-quality data pipelines. Passionate about building products that delight users through thoughtful engineering and seamless integration.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Designed and shipped a self-evolving code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity and reduced iteration cycles to under 24 hours through CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions—demonstrating the kind of rapid, high-quality iteration Apple values.

Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management and tenant isolation—building reliable, scalable systems that power production workloads.

Collaborated directly with customers to scope requirements, remove deployment blockers, and accelerate rollouts; codified deployment playbooks and runbooks to standardize operational response and ensure consistent, high-quality user experiences across production systems.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
work.description: Technology subsidiary of a biotech group — doctor-patient engagement platforms
highlights: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased user engagement by 30%; built and integrated intelligent chatbot agents in collaboration with stakeholders to deliver seamless, intuitive user workflows.

Scoped and delivered data-driven features across the full stack—from responsive front-end interfaces to optimized backend systems—coordinating cross-functional teams to prioritize roadmap items and ensure stable, rapid rollouts at scale.
Drove customer-facing growth strategies that acquired over 50,000 users in 6 months, exceeding targets through targeted outreach and workflow optimization.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Designed a SaaS product and go-to-market strategy that achieved $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years by optimizing product lifecycle, user onboarding, and data-driven iteration loops.
Led cross-functional engineering team; built internal tools that streamlined product and engineering workflows, improving team delivery cadence over a 6-month period.
Engaged directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements and uncover pain points, converting 3 strategic accounts within 3 months and improving product-market fit.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built an agentic portfolio engine that detects visitor context and dynamically adapts resume content using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines; deployed on pure GitHub infrastructure with zero third-party cost.

Designed a five-stage agent architecture (perceive → reason → act → learn → explain) with RAG-powered chat, automated JD fetching, and visitor feedback loops that continuously optimize content resonance.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built an MCP-native AI agent middleware platform giving LLMs a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer, operated entirely via Model Context Protocol tools with no traditional UI.

Designed full server architecture with OAuth, JWT, and Streamable HTTP transport; implemented LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline deployed on multi-tenant AWS infrastructure using Aurora Serverless, SES, and per-user IAM roles.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Claude Code Hosting & AI Repo Self-Evolution
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io — a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with mobile-first SSH, persistent tmux sessions, and cloud-init provisioning for secure production access.

Designed a skill-based repo self-evolution system with shared AI context and slash commands, enabling autonomous AI-driven code loops via GitHub Actions (human + AI and headless generator/evaluator workflows).

skills.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
keywords: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)

education.institution: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year), coordinated volunteers and facilitated connections to strengthen engagement and collaboration.

skill_emphasis: AWS (EC2, SES, Aurora Serverless, IAM, SCPs)
